name: Brachimon

signature_move.name: Brachio Bubble
signature_move.description: Spits out countless bubbles to attack the enemy.

description: A Plesiosaur Digimon resembling the Brachiosaurus that existed long ago. It is quite the heavyweight among dinosaur Digimon, so you'll be in for a world of hurt if you get trampled by its large body. However, because it is herbivorous and docile, it never attacks without reason. Its Special Move is spitting out countless bubbles to attack the enemy ( Brachio Bubble ).
